name: Beans'n Rice Skillet
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Can Black Beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sauce ingredients in a large skillet; mix well.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Stir in all remaining ingredients.
4. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer about 10 minutes or until rice is cooked and vegetables are tender.
